title: Made In India - News
desc: After losing his job due to the pandemic, a freelance reporter struggles to find work in mainstream media, taking an unexpected path to support his family.

title: Made In India - Offline
desc: The problem with pursuing what you truly want is not allowing yourself to do it. Some do it for themselves, but the third kind is understood only by those who've achieved it.
